prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约3127→5364→8970→8583，2022至2024年持续后移，2025年略有回升但仍处高位；近3年累计后移约5456名，2025年基准约8583 名；本省理科/物理类计划2022年31人、2023年36人、2024年47人、2025年52人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划55人，较2025年增加3人，扩招约5.8%，按 供需弹性计算使位次后移约297名。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年第35名，近年稳定在33–35名区间，属于全国顶尖财经类院校；2026年声誉评价未单独收录该校明显负面事件；抖音热度总排名第99位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号，报考心理相对平 稳；工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，共4个A-及以上学科，财经学科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度 2021年"推荐"（72.42）→2022年"分化观望"（60.96，明显降温）→2023年"分化观望"（61.15）→2024年"分化观望"（65.49，小幅升温），整体处于分化观望状态，财经类报考热 度较前几年有所回落；会计/财务/审计类专业2023年"推荐"（66.34）→2024年"推荐"（61.31），热度基本稳定。四川省2026年高考总报名约535000人，较2025年（物理类284789+ 历史类177978=462767）增加约72233人，增幅约15.6%，物理类估算约329025人，竞争明显加剧；上海财经大学位于上海 市（非本省），2025年在四川招生70人，占全国总计划1633人的4.29%，跨省招生占比稳定；上海作为一线城市对四川考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整 体后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+3人）及本省考生大幅增加（+15.6%）三方面因素，扩招使位次后移约297名，考生增加进一步推高竞争；但学校高排名（软科35）和财经学科顶 尖实力（4个A-及以上）形成品牌支撑，部分抑制位次下滑。，预测最低位次约8900名，区间8400–9400名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 3127 → 5364 → 8970 → 8583, with a continuous decline from 2022 to 2024 and a slight rebound in 2025 but still at a high level; the cumulative decline over the past 3 years is about 5456 places, with a baseline of approximately 8583 in 2025; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 31 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 52 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 55, an increase of 3 from 2025, an expansion of about 5.8%, which, based on supply-demand elasticity, would cause a ranking decline of about 297 places.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, stable in the 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions; no significant negative events were separately recorded for the school in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin popularity ranked 99th overall (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure; no signs of admission breaks in historical abnormal admission records, indicating relatively stable application psychology; Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, a total of 4 A- and above disciplines, with top national strength in finance and economics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/economics/economy majors was 'Recommended' (72.42) in 2021 → 'Divided Wait-and-See' (60.96, significant cooling) in 2022 → 'Divided Wait-and-See' (61.15) in 2023 → 'Divided Wait-and-See' (65.49, slight warming) in 2024, overall in a divided wait-and-see state, with finance and economics application popularity declining compared to previous years; accounting/finance/auditing majors were 'Recommended' (66.34) in 2023 → 'Recommended' (61.31) in 2024, with basically stable popularity. The total number of college entrance exam registrations in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 72,233 from 2025 (physics category 284,789 + history category 177,978 = 462,767), an increase of about 15.6%, with the physics category estimated at about 329,025, significantly intensifying competition; Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai (not in this province), enrolling 70 students in Sichuan in 2025, accounting for 4.29% of the total national plan of 1,633, with a stable cross-provincial enrollment proportion; Shanghai, as a first-tier city, has a certain regional appeal to Sichuan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall declining trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+3 students), and the significant increase in provincial candidates (+15.6%), the expansion causes a ranking decline of about 297 places, and the increase in candidates further intensifies competition; however, the school's high ranking (Soft Science 35) and top strength in finance and economics disciplines (4 A- and above) form brand support, partially suppressing the ranking decline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8900, with a range of 8400–9400.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8400–9400, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Statistics, Mathematics, Finance) as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting ACCA, Finance Double Degree) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Business Administration, International Economics and Trade, Economics) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8400), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 A+ discipline majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>9400), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category approximately 760→867→1247→1865, shifting backward for 4 consecutive years, cumulative shift of about 1105 positions; 2025 baseline approximately 1865, accelerating backward in recent 2 years; provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan 16 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 17 in 2024, 18 in 2025, fluctuating with slight increase; 2026 plan 17, decreasing by 1 from 2025, a reduction of about 5.6%, based on supply-demand elasticity causing ranking to move forward by about 62 positions.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 2026 reputation evaluation did not separately record any significant negative events for this school; Douyin heat total ranking 99th (evaluation "average"), moderate exposure; no signs of cutoff anomalies in historical admission records, relatively stable application psychology; Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, total 4 A- and above disciplines, top national strength in finance and economics disciplines; 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking 35th, stable in 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to national top finance and economics institutions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/financial/economics major popularity diverging and waiting, Law major 2023 "recommended" (67.82) → 2024 "diverging and waiting" (63.54), slight decline in popularity; Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors 2023 "recommended" (66.34) → 2024 "recommended" (61.31), basically stable popularity. Sichuan Province 2026 total college entrance exam registrations approximately 535,000, history category estimated about 205,975, an increase of about 27,997 from 2025 (177,978), an increase of about 15.7%, significantly intensified competition; Shanghai University of Finance and Economics located in Shanghai (not this province), 2025 enrolling 70 students in Sichuan (including arts and sciences), accounting for 4.29% of total national plan; Shanghai as a first-tier city has strong regional appeal to Sichuan liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining three factors: continuous backward trend of historical rankings, slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-1 person), and significant increase in provincial candidates (+15.7%), the enrollment reduction causes ranking to move forward by about 62 positions, but the intensified competition effect from the large increase in candidates is more significant, pushing rankings to continue moving backward, predicted minimum ranking approximately 1818, range 1545–2091.
